subcodes.title: Words to professors and clergymen, spoken on 1912-09-03
subcodes.first_line: This is the purpose of the people of Baha. Would you not like to serve such an ideal? I hope you will put forth effort in this direction so that the world of men may find real unity
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینست مقصد اهل بهآء آیا تو نمیخواهی این کار را بکنی تو هم بکوش تا عالم انسانی وحدت حقیقی یابد
